author: citrusrenegade
description: Revisit notes on a schedule you define. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: CitrusRenegade
manifest.description: Revisit notes on a schedule you define.
manifest.name: Review Simple

name: Review Simple

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Changed**
- Per-note `review_interval` values now override folder include/exclude filters, so individual notes can opt into review or use their own cadence even when their folder would otherwise be skipped.
- More overdue notes now get a better chance in random review: the plugin samples two due notes and opens the one with the higher overdue score, without removing randomness.
- Folder review rules are normalized and deduplicated when settings are loaded or edited, making folder filters and folder-specific intervals more stable across path formatting differences.
- The vault-wide due counter now reuses cached due state between updates, reducing repeated work in larger vaults.
- Settings labels for the status bar indicators and ribbon icon are shorter and clearer.

**Fixed**
- Renaming folders now updates excluded folders, included folders, and folder-specific interval rules so review settings continue to point at the moved folder.
- `reviewed` frontmatter is treated as a calendar day (`YYYY-MM-DD`), avoiding timezone-related due-status drift.
- Review status updates more reliably after marking a note as reviewed, changing settings, renaming files, or reloading synced plugin data.
- The review confirmation modal no longer stacks duplicate confirmations.
- Multiline folder settings now save after typing settles, making textarea edits smoother.
- Custom frontmatter keys are validated before saving so blank or invalid keys do not break review metadata.
- `review_interval: never` is recognized more consistently across common frontmatter forms.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Added**
- Optional "Show ribbon icon" setting adds a left ribbon button for opening a random note due for review.
- File Explorer folder context menus can now exclude a folder from review while the plugin is in excluded-folder mode.

**Changed**
- Status bar visibility toggles now apply immediately without restarting Obsidian.
- Review-related settings now refresh the active note indicator and due counter without reloading the plugin.
- The README now points regular users to the Community Plugins directory while keeping BRAT for development builds.

**Fixed**
- The due counter icon now stays compact instead of increasing the status bar height.
- Release assets now include GitHub artifact attestations, and dashboard build verification works with pnpm's esbuild approval requirements.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Changed**
- The "Mark as reviewed" command now hides from the command palette when no Markdown file is open, instead of showing an error. *(switched to `checkCallback`)*
- Folder paths in settings now go through `normalizePath()` for cross-platform safety — handles backslashes, double slashes, and Unicode on Windows.

**Fixed**
- Status bar items no longer duplicate when the plugin reloads via BRAT or Hot Reload.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Changed**
- Status bar visibility is now controlled via a CSS class — themes and snippets can override it.
- UI text uses consistent sentence case throughout.

**Fixed**
- The "Not reviewed" indicator no longer shows `[object Object]` when frontmatter contains non-string values.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
> ⚠ Breaking: plugin id was renamed from `obsd-review` to `review-simple`. Existing BRAT installs need to be removed and reinstalled.

**Added**
- MIT license.

**Changed**
- Settings headings and layout updated to match Obsidian's plugin UI conventions.

releases.author: CitrusRenegade
releases.description:
**Added**
- New "Show review status in status bar" setting — toggle the per-note indicator on or off independently from the due counter. Requires Obsidian restart to apply.

**Changed**
- Due counter tooltip now hints that clicking it opens a random due note.

releases.author: CitrusRenegade
releases.description:
**Added**
- **Due counter** — status bar now shows total notes due across the vault, with tooltip. Click to open a random due note. Can be disabled in settings.
- **Folder filter mode** — toggle between "Excluded folders" and "Included folders only" modes. Each mode keeps its own list; switching preserves both.

**Changed**
- Review indicator is now pinned left of all built-in Obsidian status bar items.

**Fixed**
- Confirmation dialog no longer has excessive top padding.
